title: Hodge-to-de Rham Comparison — Surjectivity Transfer

analysis.object: T733: Hodge-to-de Rham Comparison — Surjectivity Transfer depth analysis

derham_surjectivity.description: de Rham: every closed form represents cohomology class -- surjective
derham_surjectivity.reason: Poincare lemma forces surjectivity -- EML-2 result

hodge_derham_iso.description: H^*(X,C) iso H^*_dR(X) -- Hodge-de Rham isomorphism

derham_to_hodge_transfer.description: Can de Rham surjectivity transfer to Hodge surjectivity?
derham_to_hodge_transfer.reason: Need: closed form of type (p,p) -> algebraic cycle

dolbeault_analog.description: Dolbeault: closed (p,0) forms are holomorphic -- rigid

surjectivity_gap_type.description: de Rham surjective over C; Hodge asks surjectivity over Q -- rationality constraint
surjectivity_gap_type.reason: Rationality is the true gap -- not the analytic part

rational_hodge_barrier.description: The gap is entirely in the rationality requirement -- T733
rational_hodge_barrier.reason: Rational structure on complex manifold is the EML-inf component

analysis.theorem: T733: Hodge-to-de Rham Comparison — Surjectivity Transfer (S1012).

key_theorem: T733: Hodge-to-de Rham Comparison — Surjectivity Transfer (S1012).
